---
layout: cv
title: Portfolio
---
# Lincoln Huls
Computer Science

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/lincoln-huls-906a023a0/">https://www.linkedin.com/in/lincoln-huls-906a023a0/</a>
</div>


## Currently

Studying computer science at Brigham Young Univeristy - Idaho

### Specialized in

Python, Machine Learning, Arduino, MQTT


### Research interests

Machine Learning, backend development, game development, IoT


## Education

`2017-2021`
__Thunder Ridge High School__

`September 2021 - December 2021, April 2024 - now`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__

## Awards

`2026`
Computer Programming Certificate, Brigham Young University - Idaho
Function Programming Certificate, Brigham Young University - Idaho
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, Brigham Young University - Idaho

## Occupation

`January 2022 - March 2022, April 2024 - June 2024`
__Special Ed Teacher - TempleView Elementary__, 

`August 2024 - now`
__Research and Development - Teton Technology__, 



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
